[@microsoft/fast-element/attribute-map.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [JSONSchemaCommon](../fast-element.jsonschemacommon/index.html) &gt; [$observe](../fast-element.jsonschemacommon._observe/index.html)

## JSONSchemaCommon.$observe property

Stamped by `applyConfigToSchema` when an `ObserverMapConfig` excludes this path. When `false`<!-- -->, the proxy system skips observation for this node and (if all descendants are also `false`<!-- -->) its subtree.

**Signature:**

```typescript
$observe?: boolean;
```
